title: Indulgent Aerated Canadian Cottage Cheese Bake
description: A rich and creamy Canadian dish featuring cottage cheese, topped with a crispy, double-fried coating. This lacto-vegetarian-friendly recipe is perfect for a comforting snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the crumbled cottage cheese, grated onion, chopped parsley, maple syrup, mustard powder, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Stir until smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, unsalted butter, and whole-whey-rice flour.

In a greased 9-inch springform pan, arrange a layer of the cottage cheese mixture, followed by a layer of the egg mixture, and repeat until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of egg mixture on top.
Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese on top of the egg layer and bake for 35 minutes.

While the bake is in the oven, prepare the double-fry-kfc-style-fried-cauliflower-bits by first frying them in hot oil until golden, then chilling them in the refrigerator before frying again until crispy.
Once the bake is done, remove it from the oven and top it with the fried cauliflower-bits, grated durum-wheat-breadcrumbs, and a sprinkle of black pepper.
Return the bake to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional parsley and serve warm, or at room temperature.
